career_timeline.org: 中共潮州市湘桥区委员会
career_timeline.title: 区委书记
career_timeline.notes: Confirmed as current 区委书记 as of July 2026. Presided over 区委常委会 on 2026-07-16 and 城中村整治百日攻坚动员大会 on 2026-07-22.

organizations.name: 中共潮州市湘桥区委员会

relationships.evidence: Confirmed working relationship as 区委书记 (王长春) and 区长 (李树南). Both presided over the 城中村整治百日攻坚动员大会 on 2026-07-22, with 王长春 delivering the keynote speech and 李树南 chairing the meeting.
Both mentioned attending 城中村整治百日攻坚动员大会 on 2026-07-22. 黄伟涛 is 区人大常委会主任.

governance_record.achievement_or_event: Presided over 湘桥区城中村整治百日攻坚行动动员大会, launching a 100-day campaign for urban village renovation covering environmental cleanup, infrastructure construction, and industrial development.
governance_record.measurable_outcome: Launched comprehensive urban village renovation campaign

governance_record.achievement_or_event: Chaired 区委常委会 meeting studying Xi Jinping's speech at the 105th CPC anniversary, covering party building, tourism industry rectification, and 百千万工程 implementation.
